pinned_comment: Free app: cold-plan-app.web.app — build your own cold medicine kit for pennies.

shorts.cta: Full breakdown in the main video
shorts.strategy: Hero short. Leads with price split, proves FDA equivalence, bookend close. Post Day 1 on all platforms.

platform_titles.instagram: NyQuil costs $12. Three generic pills cost $0.47. Same medicine. Same FDA-required ingredients. Full breakdown link in bio. #ConsumerAdvocacy #LifeHack #SaveMoney #GenericMeds #ColdMedicine #Reels
platform_titles.tiktok: The cold medicine industry has been running this on us for decades #ColdMedicine #SaveMoney #LifeHack #ConsumerAdvocacy #GenericDrugs

shorts.hook: Advil PM is 5 cents of medicine.
shorts.strategy: Most shocking single stat. Advil PM = $0.05 vs $14. Instant outrage, complete story.

platform_titles.instagram: Advil PM = ibuprofen + Benadryl. Two of the cheapest generic drugs you can buy. Five cents per dose. They charge $14. Full breakdown link in bio. #ConsumerAdvocacy #DrugPrices #SaveMoney #AdvilPM #Reels
